untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'estimated fundamental value' and 'market resiliency indicator' which are not available in the allowed indicator list. These are derived/composite metrics requiring external calculation or ML models. The 'dealer volume detection' and precise deviation thresholds from fundamental value cannot be directly translated to standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: Approximated using: (1) Price deviation from MA20 as proxy for fundamental value deviation, (2) Bollinger Band percentile (bb_pct_b) to detect extreme deviations, (3) Volume decline relative to 20-period SMA to detect momentum exhaustion, (4) ATR expansion as proxy for market resiliency loss (widening spreads). Entry conditions use AND logic for confluence. Exit uses OR logic with time-based stop of 5 periods. Position sizing set to 5% per parameters. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to support both long and short counter-trend entries.
